---
title: "Job Market Analysis 2024"
page-layout: full
toc: false
body-classes: home-page
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-text}
<h1>Job Market Analysis 2024</h1>

<h2>AI, Salary, Skills, and Employment Trends</h2>

<p>This project analyzes 2024 job posting data to understand how AI-related careers, compensation skills, locations, and work arrangements shape the modern labor market.</p>

<a href="salary_compensation_trends.html" class="hero-button">Explore the Analysis</a>
:::
:::

## Project Guide

::: {.guide-intro}
This website is organized into several sections. Start with the project overview to understand the dataset and research goals, then move through data preparation, salary trends, and career-skill analysis.
:::

::: {.guide-grid}

::: {.guide-card}
### Project Overview
Introduces the purpose of the project and the main research questions.

[Open section](introduction.html){.guide-card-link .stretched-link aria-label="Open Project Overview"}
:::

::: {.guide-card}
### Data Preparation
Explains how the raw Lightcast job posting data was cleaned and transformed.

[Open section](data_cleaning.html){.guide-card-link .stretched-link aria-label="Open Data Preparation"}
:::

::: {.guide-card}
### Salary & Compensation Trends
Compares AI vs. non-AI salaries, remote work pay, regional differences, and wage growth.

[Open section](salary_compensation_trends.html){.guide-card-link .stretched-link aria-label="Open Salary and Compensation Trends"}
:::

::: {.guide-card}
### Career & Skill Trends
Analyzes business analytics, data science, and machine learning job trends.

[Open section](trends.html){.guide-card-link .stretched-link aria-label="Open Career and Skill Trends"}
:::

:::
